text:
敵の強烈な突進をかわし
強烈な一撃を角に叩きこむ……！
胸のすくような立ち回りですね！

今後、ノーディランと対峙したさいには
この方法で打ち破りたいと思います！

先生、ご指導のほど
ありがとうございました！
またよろしくお願いいた

Dodging the enemy's ferocious charge and
delivering an equally ferocious blow to knock
its horn off... You never cease to amaze me!

I hope I can pull off moves even HALF that
slick when it's my turn to face a Nordeeran!

I totally toot your tutelage, Teach!
Looking forward to learning more from you!
